params.name: Five Oxen
params.description:
On Feb 23, 768 AD, Han Huang painted the Five Oxen.
Five Oxen is 139.8 cm long and 20.8 cm wide. The painting, as the name suggests, is of five oxen without any background. The oxen are positioned in a line, each with a distinctive appearance, walking or standing, holding their heads high or low. The oxen have bright, piercing eyes and different temperaments: lively, docile, romping and even eccentric. Han Huang was renowned for painting people and animals with detailed facial expressions. He …
